title: CentralВ 1ГўВҖВҷs File Specifications
body_text:
CentralВ 1ГўВҖВҷs File Specifications
1	Introduction to CentralВ 1ГўВҖВҷs File Specifications
1.1	Overview of CentralВ 1ГўВҖВҷs File Specifications
This Part provides information on the available documents that provide format and specification details of outgoing data files produced by CentralВ 1 for financial institutions and of incoming data files produced by financial institutions for CentralВ 1. The information in this Part is intended as a technical reference for financial institutions and banking systems that retrieve and process clearing files and for financial institutions that submit files for returns processing. Full descriptions and procedures related to products and services associated with these files are available in other Parts of the Payment Solutions Manual.
Related Information
File Exchange and Report Distribution Part
Electronic Bill Payments System Part
Incoming Clearing Items Part
1.2	Financial Institution/Banking System Responsibilities
Financial institutions and/or banking systems are responsible for the following:
Retrieving and processing clearing files in a timely manner
Creating and delivering AFT I & J Batch Returns and cheque return processing files according to established deadlines
Ensuring that there is an A record and corresponding Z record for each batch, if applicable
Ensuring that the file creation numbers in the A record follow sequentially from one A record to the next and from the last A record in one file to the first A record in the next dayГўВҖВҷs file, if applicable
Ensuring that their computer system can:
ГўВҲВ’
Override a non-sequential creation number upon official notification from CentralВ 1
ГўВҲВ’
Accept ГўВҖВңNullГўВҖВқ files, where applicable, for days when there are no transactions
Reporting any problems immediately to CentralВ 1
Retaining/archiving retrieved files for future reference
